experience.company: PT. Prima Data Semesta (Onsite ICON Plus)
responsibilities: Focused on functional, negative, and monkey testing to ensure product reliability under expected and edge-case scenarios.
Built blueprints and BRDs for multiple applications including Bag Daily, eTransport, iSPPD, eTravel, and SSO.
Designed and executed stress and load testing using JMeter, analyzing metrics such as response time, throughput, and error rates.
Created API automation suites using Postman and Newman, reducing manual regression effort.
Produced flowcharts and technical documentation for development and business teams.
Reported bugs with structured details including reproduction steps, impact, and priority.

experience.company: PT. Mega Giga Solusindo (Onsite ICON Plus)
responsibilities: Created bug reports in Jira with complete reproduction steps and follow-up tracking.
Performed API testing using Postman and conducted early stress/load testing using JMeter.
Executed functional and negative testing to identify hidden defects early.
Reviewed large volumes of multimedia content with high attention to detail.
Documented and classified policy violations with structured reporting.

projects.name: iOffice
